summary: P1/P2 Features Testing Complete: Matrix View, Scenarios Comparison, Gantt Interactive, Projected Stock Advanced. All backend APIs (12 tests) and frontend UI tests pass.
seed_data_creation: Existing scenarios Test 1 and Test_2 used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1/P2 features fully tested and working. Created comprehensive pytest file for regression testing.

matrix_view.api: /api/matrix/machine-task - Returns 200 with machines, taches, matrix, rules_count
matrix_view.frontend: /matrix - Shows 8 machines, 4 taches, 5 rules, legend with status icons
matrix_view.navigation: Matrice Compat. link in sidebar works

scenarios_comparison.api: /api/scenarios/compare?ids=... - Returns comparison with metrics and best indicators
scenarios_comparison.frontend: /scenarios - Multiple selection, Compare button, modal with metrics table
features_tested: Modal shows metrics: operations, conflicts, makespan, late ops, machines, solver time

gantt_interactive.frontend: /gantt/:id - Shows 24 tasks, 5 machines, timeline with zoom controls

scenario_delete.api: /api/scenarios/:id DELETE - Returns 404 for non-existent, 200 for deletion
scenario_delete.frontend: Delete buttons present for each scenario row

test_methodology: Backend: pytest with 12 test cases. Frontend: Playwright browser automation with screenshots
